context: A pivotal moment in this group stage match. France lead Denmark 2-1. The game hangs in the balance — every decision from the touchline could decide the outcome.

options.label: A
options.action: Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep

options.label: B

options.label: C

real_decision.description: France won 2-1. Kylian Mbappé Lottin (60'), Andreas Christensen (67'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (85').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Defensive substitution — bring on a fresh center-back, sit deep**
Risk level: Medium. This is the safe, professional choice that protects the lead without abandoning attacking threat. In the context of this group stage match between France and Denmark (2-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Drop deeper as a unit, protect the lead, counter-attack**
Risk level: Low. This is a solid conservative choice that prioritizes defensive stability. Low risk of conceding, but may invite pressure. In the context of this group stage match between France and Denmark (2-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Keep attacking — the best defense is a good offense**
Risk level: High. This is the aggressive choice. Keeping attacking intent when leading can catch opponents off guard but leaves defensive gaps. In the context of this group stage match between France and Denmark (2-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Bring on a defensive midfielder, switch to 5-4-1**
Risk level: Low. This is the ultra-defensive option. Maximum security at the back, but surrenders possession and invites sustained pressure. In the context of this group stage match between France and Denmark (2-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
